tree.name: Nic Claxton
tree.note: Georgia big man, drafted #31 overall. Athletic rim-running center, signed 4yr/$100M extension in 2024. One of the few remaining homegrown Nets.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2019 2nd Round Pick (#31) via NYK
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 76ers traded Jahlil Okafor, Nik Stauskas, and a 2019 2nd-round pick (NYK own, became Nic Claxton) to BKN for Trevor Booker.
assetsGivenUp.note: Originally a New York Knicks 2nd-round pick. Traded NYK → PHI (Oct 2014 in Arnett Moultrie deal), then PHI → BKN (Dec 2017 in Trevor Booker trade).

assetsGivenUp.name: Trevor Booker
assetsGivenUp.note: Power forward, signed as free agent by BKN (July 2017). Sent to PHI in the Okafor/Stauskas trade that brought the pick used to draft Claxton.
